message:
bd-ml2r.5.1: implement centrality cache and stable normalization

Add fnx_ordering.rs module with:
- QuantizedScore: deterministic integer-based ordering to avoid FP issues
- compute_centrality_scores: caches degree centrality per node
- compare_with_centrality: centrality-aware comparison for barycenter ties
- centrality_cache_key: stable hash for cache invalidation

11 unit tests verify determinism, quantization, and comparison logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
